svg.text: SPM meta data structure — md_t (368 b / 46 B), RTL-verified
bit layout: design/common/packages/mdata_pkg.sv in Positron-AI-TSMC/asimov (RTL, source of truth) — cross-checked vs design/spm/rtl + cmn_acp_mgr.sv, 2026-07-10
naming: md_t = the specs’ “meta-data” = “RG data” — stored in rg_mem, a dedicated array parallel to the 16 MiB data memory. The refmod_exp copy of mdata_pkg.sv is STALE.
RD_T — ROUTING DATA, 176 b (4 ROWS × 44 b, MSB LEFT)
1 acp_mem_target_sel [151] · OCM(0)/DRAM(1) 2 c2c_source_override [149] 3 c2c_dest_multicast [148] 4 acp_core_sel [144] · A/B core
[71:56] · 16 b · C2C remote SPM write addr
5 spm_source [73:72] — stamped by SPM on ingest: SVL(0) · SAL(1) · C2C(2) · CMN(3)
6 gd_valid [7] 7 send_to_sal [6] 8 send_to_cmn [5] — must be 1 for CMN path 9 send_to_c2c [4]
C2C fabric (dest/source addr · counter idx · multicast · override)
GD_T — GENERATED DATA, 192 b UNION (UNCHANGED IN RTL)
topk_gd_t — 8 lanes, lane k = { idx_k [8 b] | val_k [16 b] }; lane 7 at MSB, lane 0 at LSB · 24 B
attn_gd_t — Σz (sume) and max (smax), 19 b each
ACP DELIVERY — WHAT SOFTWARE READS (RTL: cmn_acp_mgr.sv, supersedes stale pkg comments)
core_idx = 2*acp_dsu_sel + acp_core_sel; base22 = acp_mem_target_sel ? dram_base[core_idx] : ocm_base[core_idx] // per-core PA[43:22] CSRs
acp_addr = { base22, rd.s.acp_rd_addr, 6'b0 } // 44-bit · 64 B slot per record
rd_t — 32 B write, always (22 B used)
gd_t — 32 B write @ +32, iff gd_valid (24 B used)
two 32 B AXI writes (awsize=32, single beat), distinct AWIDs from a per-DSU counter · slots fully tile the two 64K × 64 B regions (OCM, DRAM)
cache stash via ACE5 WriteUniquePtlStash + per-DSU cfg_acp_stashlpid CSR; cache/snoop/domain attributes CSR-driven (not hardwired write-through)
5 per-DSU FIFOs, depth 32 = 2×SPM_RG_INIT_CREDIT · 1 credit pulse to SPM per record · B-responses ignored · overflow → sticky status + IRQ
QUEUE CONTAINERS & MEMORIES — spm_mdata / rg_data (BYPASS = SAL QUEUE ONLY; ALL OTHERS STORE-AND-FORWARD)
1 md_t entry per 256 B data word
written by the same producers via
rd arbiter (3 ports, addr[5:0] conflict check) pops addr → reads record
bypass (SAL queue ONLY, reset default): straight to e_queue while credit ≥ 8 · C2C + DSU queues always store-and-forward [RTL: spm_mdata.sv j==0]

Layout source: Positron-AI-TSMC/asimov design/common/packages/mdata_pkg.sv + design/spm/rtl + design/css/cmn/rtl/cmn_acp_mgr.sv @ main (2026-07-10). refmod_exp copy of mdata_pkg.sv is stale — do not use.
